results.description: Rather than relying on periodic reviews or delayed security handoffs, organizations can embed continuous validation more directly into the software delivery process as code, infrastructure, and services evolve. "We aren't competing with the AI’s reasoning; we are providing the professional-grade tools that reasoning requires," says Rickard Carlsson, CEO of Detectify. "By structuring our capabilities as modular, high-performance building blocks, we allow agents to call our scanner as naturally as they call a test runner.
